title: fragaria breslingea var. nigra
intro: Fragaria breslingea var. nigra, also known as the black alpine strawberry, is a type of strawberry plant native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The black alpine strawberry has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. Herbal preparations of Fragaria breslingea var. nigra can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
